$comment: Kazakhstan explicit unknowns — facts we do NOT know and refuse to infer. Each maps to a claim with status=unknown (or a research gap with no claim yet). Unknowns stay visible until Phase 3+ evidence resolves them.

unknowns.description: Whether KZ users via global bybit.com (/go/bybit) get the global product+bonus or are routed to the AFSA-licensed Bybit Kazakhstan product with different terms.
Whether any tracked welcome bonus/promo code is actually claimable by Kazakhstan-registered users. postSignupVerification remains not_available by policy.

unknowns.claim_id: kz-bybit-affiliate-geo-006 (+ equivalents not yet claimed for other exchanges)
unknowns.description: Affiliate-program GEO eligibility of Kazakhstan traffic for all six exchanges — no official affiliate-terms source captured yet.
unknowns.blocked_by: official affiliate terms research (kz-t02 remainder) + PROXY_KZ (kz-t11)

unknowns.description: Whether mexc/okx/kucoin/bingx are among the 1,100+ platforms technically blocked inside Kazakhstan — no official blocked-platform list found; only a live in-country test can tell.
Per-exchange KYC acceptance of Kazakhstan identity documents (ID card/passport) — no official acceptable-documents source captured for any of the six.
iOS App Store / Google Play availability in the Kazakhstan storefronts for all six exchanges.
KZT P2P support and liquidity on mexc/okx/kucoin/bingx (bybit covered by kz-bybit-p2p-kzt-003 at verified_with_limits).
Whether the NBK (post-2026-05-01 regime) has licensed/registered any of the six exchanges outside the AIFC — NBK register not yet located/captured.
